data.name: The Lodge
data.detailed_description:
Renting lodges for living, your company offers the best suburban rent services. Unleash the story behind every customer by joining them during the accommodation!

This game tells the story of a male protagonist who owns a company that enables people to easily rent stunning lodges in a quiet and peaceful forest. At the start, you have one lodge but the goal is to expand the business further. To accomplish this, you need to build good relationships with your clients. This business management simulator also opens up new opportunities to meet many sexy women and every choice you make will influence how well you get along with them. If you play your cards right, you may get to have hot and intense sex with all kinds of blondes, brunettes, redheads, MILFs, etc. Flex your skills in business and watch just how fast this game turns into an uncensored sex romp that pays off in more ways than one.

The Lodge relies on a dual perspective, the quiet nature environment surrounded by trees and the lively urban lifestyle.​

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later (32-bit or 64-bit x86).
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics with full OpenGL 3.3 support
